pi_items.verified_value: Sepsis definition, SOFA score criteria, qSOFA criteria, and treatment recommendations match published SSC 2021 guidelines
pi_items.source: Verified against https://jamanetwork.com/journals/jama/fullarticle/2492881 (Sepsis-3 definition) and SSC guidelines - SOFA score >= 2 for organ dysfunction, MAP >= 65 mmHg target, lactate > 2 mmol/L, 30 mL/kg crystalloid fluids all match authoritative sources

privileged_info_summary: The document is synthetically generated using python-docx based on authentic Surviving Sepsis Campaign 2021 clinical guidelines. The draft document begins with incorrect formatting: Liberation Serif 12pt font, 1.25-inch margins, and single spacing. The task requires reformatting to Liberation Sans/Arial 11pt, 1.0-inch margins, 1.15 line spacing, and applying Heading 1 styles to 9 major sections (Purpose and Scope, Definitions, Screening and Early Identification, Initial Resuscitation, Antimicrobial Therapy, Hemodynamic Management, Organ Support, Monitoring and Reassessment, References). The medical content includes accurate definitions from Sepsis-3 (organ dysfunction at SOFA >= 2, MAP target 65 mmHg, lactate > 2 mmol/L) and qSOFA criteria. The task description specifies the header should include 'Effective 2024' but metadata omits this suffix.
